description: The blanket-retag pass at ir_codegen.rs:4512 iterates var_env (HashMap) and emits ishl/bor pairs in non-deterministic order. Add sort_unstable_by_key(|(rv,_)| *rv) before the emit loop so CLIF output is stable across runs. One line.
title: fz-ul4.rep.0: sort to_retag for deterministic CLIF emission
